session.user:
Update the file /home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/tui/app/test_plan_body_screen.py:
1. Add this import line after the existing FakePlanDataProvider import: `from erk_shared.gateway.plan_service.fake import FakePlanService`
2. For EVERY test method that constructs ErkDashApp: a. Create a `service = FakePlanService()` variable BEFORE the ErkDashApp constructor b. Add `service=service` to the ErkDashApp constructor call c. Change ALL `provider.set_plan_content(...)` calls to `service.set_plan_content(...)` d. Change ALL `provider.set_objective_content(...)` calls to `service.set_objective_content(...)`
The pattern change is: - Old: `ErkDashApp(provider=provider, filters=filters, refresh_interval=0)` - New: `ErkDashApp(provider=provider, service=service, filters=filters, refresh_interval=0)`
Read the file first, then make all needed edits. Be thorough - there are about 11 ErkDashApp calls and many set_plan_content/set_objective_content calls that need updating.

1→"""Tests for PlanBodyScreen modal.""" 2→ 3→import pytest 4→from textual.widgets import Markdown 5→ 6→from erk.tui.app import ErkDashApp 7→from erk.tui.data.types import PlanFilters 8→from erk.tui.screens.plan_body_screen import PlanBodyScreen 9→from erk.tui.views.types import ViewMode 10→from erk_shared.gateway.plan_data_provider.fake import FakePlanDataProvider, make_plan_row 11→ 12→ 13→class TestPlanBodyScreen: 14→ """Tests for PlanBodyScreen modal (view plan text with async loading).""" 15→ 16→ @pytest.mark.asyncio 17→ async def test_v_key_opens_issue_body_screen(self) -> None: 18→ """Pressing 'v' opens the issue body modal.""" 19→ provider = FakePlanDataProvider( 20→ plans=[make_plan_row(123, "Test Plan", plan_body="metadata body")] 21→ ) 22→ provider.set_plan_content(123, "# Test Plan\n\nThis is the plan content.") 23→ filters = PlanFilters.default() 24→ app = ErkDashApp(provider=provider, filters=filters, refresh_interval=0) 25→ 26→ async with app.run_test() as pilot: 27→ await pilot.pause() 28→ await pilot.pause() 29→ 30→ # Press 'v' to view plan content
... [280 lines omitted] ...

session.assistant:
Perfect! I've successfully updated the file `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/tui/app/test_plan_body_screen.py` with all the required changes:
## Summary of Changes
1. **Added import**: Added `from erk_shared.gateway.plan_service.fake import FakePlanService` after the existing `FakePlanDataProvider` import.
2. **Updated all 11 test methods** with the following pattern: - Created a `service = FakePlanService()` variable before each `ErkDashApp` constructor - Added `service=service` parameter to all 11 `ErkDashApp` constructor calls - Changed all `provider.set_plan_content(...)` calls to `service.set_plan_content(...)` - Changed all `provider.set_objective_content(...)` calls to `service.set_objective_content(...)`
## Test Methods Updated
1. `test_v_key_opens_issue_body_screen` 2. `test_issue_body_screen_fetches_and_shows_content` 3. `test_issue_body_screen_dismisses_on_escape` 4. `test_issue_body_screen_dismisses_on_q` 5. `test_issue_body_screen_dismisses_on_space` 6. `test_issue_body_screen_does_not_dismiss_on_arbitrary_key` 7. `test_issue_body_screen_shows_empty_message_when_no_content` 8. `test_issue_body_screen_shows_plan_number_and_title` 9. `test_issue_body_screen_renders_content_as_markdown` 10. `test_objective_view_shows_objective_header_and_fetches_content` 11. `test_plan_body_screen_does_not_dismiss_on_unmapped_key`
All changes follow the exact pattern you specified, moving content management responsibilities from the `FakePlanDataProvider` to the `FakePlanService` while maintaining the test behavior.
